title: The Three Pathways
executive_summary: > [!quote] _"Do not be conformed to this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind."_ — Romans 12:2 We do not claim to have captured God in equations. The packet separates publishable language from unresolved math, axiom, and contradiction obligations.
plain_english: > [!quote] _"Do not be conformed to this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind."_ — Romans 12:2 The surrender parameter $s$ from Art 0.5 — [Free Will](https://www.oxfordreference.com/view/10.1093/acref/free+will) in Two Frames — the variable that determines whether you're autonomous ($s = -1$), at threshold ($s = 0$), or surrendered ($s = +1$) — isn't just a mathematical abstraction. Each $... This article walks through all three pathways. What your brain does at each $s$ value. What it feels like from the inside. And why the framework's equation predicts exactly the clinical data that addiction medicine, contemplative neuroscience, and behavioral psychology have independently discovered. In simpler terms, the article is trying to establish: We do not claim to have captured God in equations. The math layer has been extracted separately so equations can be translated and checked without blurring them into the prose.

contradictions.text: # The Three Pathways > [!quote] _"Do not be conformed to this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind."_ — Romans 12:2 Your brain has three modes.

This is the most exhausting position — and the most common one in church pews on Sunday morning. **Moderate dopamine + high cortisol.** The performer gets enough reward from religious behavior (social approval, sense of virtue, completed rituals) to keep dopamine functional but not enough to create genuine satisfaction.
The equation explains why: at $s \approx 0$, both the growth term ($O \cdot G(1-C)$) and the decay term ($S \cdot C$) are active but roughly balanced. $dC/dt \approx 0$.

And maintenance under constant pressure is draining. **Anterior cingulate cortex overactive.** The ACC is the brain's conflict monitor — the region that detects discrepancy between where you are and where you think you should be.
Jesus identified this pattern precisely. "You are like whitewashed tombs — beautiful on the outside but full of dead bones on the inside" (Matthew 23:27).
But the internal dynamics are stagnant.
And stagnation under chronic stress is not sustainable. --- ## Path 3: Surrender (s = +1) **The neurochemistry of "Not my will, but Yours."** At $s = +1$, the coupling function $\alpha(s) = 1$.
Not the dorsolateral PFC of executive control (which the performer uses), but the _ventromedial_ — the part that processes identity, meaning, and relational connection.
The system relaxes into connection — not passive relaxation (that's $s \approx 0$ sliding toward $-1$), but active receptivity.
The person looks the same from outside but has shifted from receiving to striving.

If $s$ is the surrender parameter and $O$ is openness, then the daily question isn't "am I being good enough?" (Path 2 thinking) but "am I receiving?" **Morning thanksgiving.** Before asking for anything, begin with gratitude.

math_items.expression: > [!quote] _"Do not be conformed to this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind."_ — Romans 12:2

At $s = -1$, the system is fully decoupled from the Logos Field. The coupling function $\alpha(s) = 0$. Grace ($G$) is available but unreceived. The equation reduces to pure decay: $dC/dt = -S \cdot C$.

At $s = +1$, the coupling function $\alpha(s) = 1$. Full permeability. Grace flows without resistance. The equation operates at maximum growth rate: $dC/dt = G(1-C) - S \cdot C$, where the $G$ term dominates $S$.

Paul: "When I am weak, then I am strong" (2 Corinthians 12:10). This is the $s: 0 \to +1$ transition stated in one sentence. Weakness = the performer's strategies failing. Strong = $G$ flowing through the channel that performance was blocking.

seven_q_items.text: The surrender parameter $s$ from Art 0.5 — [Free Will](https://www.oxfordreference.com/view/10.1093/acref/free+will) in Two Frames — the variable that determines whether you're autonomous ($s = -1$), at threshold ($s = 0$), or surrendered ($s = +1$) — isn't just a mathematical abstraction.
And stagnation under chronic stress is not sustainable. --- ## Path 3: Surrender (s = +1) **The neurochemistry of "Not my will, but Yours."** At $s = +1$, the coupling function $\alpha(s) = 1$.

The neurochemistry of surrender is strikingly different from both autonomy and performance. **Ventromedial PFC activates.** The vmPFC — the region associated with self-referential processing, emotional regulation, and value-based decision making — comes online.
AA operates on $s$ — teaching surrender, which opens the channel to $G$, which provides negentropic input that the system cannot generate internally. "Apart from me you can do nothing" (John 15:5).
The shift from performance to surrender typically requires the performer to fail.

If $s$ is the surrender parameter and $O$ is openness, then the daily question isn't "am I being good enough?" (Path 2 thinking) but "am I receiving?" **Morning thanksgiving.** Before asking for anything, begin with gratitude.
The body is leaving surrender and entering performance.
And the coupling coefficient is determined by one thing: the surrender parameter.

That's the moment Path 3 became continuously available, not just episodically. --- ## Related Notes - Parent: [Free Will](https://www.oxfordreference.com/view/10.1093/acref/free+will) in Two Frames — source article introducing the s parameter and the dC/dt coherence equation governing all three pathways - [[MacArthur and the Equation]] — sibling tangent: the same s = -1/0/+1 parameter analyzed theologically; Augus...
AA operates on s — teaching surrender, which opens α(s) from near-zero toward 1, enabling G input.

We offer this work as worship, not as containment. --- --- ## Related Tangential Articles - [[TANGENT1_Architectural_Intent|TANGENT1_Architectural_Intent]] - [[TANGENT2_Scientific_Method_Redux|TANGENT2_Scientific_Method_Redux]] - [[TANGENT4_Ten_Laws_Index|TANGENT4_Ten_Laws_Index]] - [[04_THEOPYHISCS/___THE CONVERGENCE TX 6.6/GENESIS TO QUANTUM The Seven-Article Series/01-A_Collapse Threshold|01-A_Collapse Threshol...

claims.text: We do not claim to have captured God in equations.
We claim that when we look at His creation honestly — with the tools of physics and the revelation of Scripture — the same structure appears in both.

open_obligations: Review suspected contradictions/tensions and mark as resolved, live tension, or true contradiction.
Translate each extracted equation into plain English and verify the isomorphism claim.
Attach evidence, axiom links, and falsification criteria to the strongest claims.
Map detected 7QS handles to the exact question slot and mark missing slots.
